item.title: If this makes it out of usersub I'll go down...

I'm cleaning a vacant, very old shop.. Update for you heathens.. I need a coffee https://imgur.com/gallery/I2aGnc0
It's so freakin dark I can't see the end of the stairs. And the bloody light doesn't work. **My first time on the front page! Send something to cure the spook please**

item.title: At this point I think I’m beyond trying.
item.description: For the first 10 years of our marriage, my ex was abusing drugs. I found out, and she began blaming her own ex, who she claimed was an abusive partner. She made up an elaborate history, and while I’ll give her the Oscar for being a good liar, I knew her story didn’t make sense. But it served its purpose, and I generally believed she used drugs because her ex had been abusive. I insisted she stop using drugs for our children’s sake. She promised she would, and told me she’d gone to our doctor for therapy. I kept catching her high. My own brother was an addict, so I knew. Each time she blamed her ex, and promised she was getting help. At this time, my doctor began acting different to me, which should have been a warning, but I’m not a magician. Eventually, we broke up. The doctor stated she was clean, and our children should go with her. I had to agree, having no choice. About 10 years ago, she dropped the kids off, and had a flat tire. I offered to change it, and unloaded her trunk to get the jack and spare. I found a bag of pills and some kind of powder. She immediately denied it was hers, blaming someone from her work. This was the last straw, it was too stupid to take seriously. I told her that was it, I would never believe a thing she ever said again. I didn’t know what to do, because I know she would tell the cops I planted the drugs, and they’d believe her because she’s such a good liar. My kids were nearly grown, too, so I believed time would let me explain to them. Fast forward 10 years. Today my daughter was here, and the subject of why my other daughter will not visit came up. She screamed at me about being an abusive partner, using the exact words my ex had used against her own ex. I didn’t take long to figure out she’d been hiding behind the same lie, in order to distract people so she can take drugs, since when she went for “therapy” with the doctor. So long as she kept up the lie, she got sympathy, and instant discredit whenever I warned people not to trust her. She also spent the entire time poisoning my kids against me, and now they will never speak to me again. I’d been told the whole time that time would work things out, that my children would come around, and right now I don’t think that’s true. I can’t talk to anyone in my life about it, because even my mother believed my ex. I just wanted to vent. I’m not looking for points or sympathy. Maybe even to let other people whose kids were poisoned by vindictive exes they’re not alone. I have my faith, and I won’t spend my last years in the street, but being robbed of grandchildren, and to have nearly every single person I know believe I’m a scumbag hurt. So that’s my vent. If you hear gossip, and someone is telling you s**t about someone you don’t need to know, be careful. If her lies come back to haunt her, a lot of people will look like fools. Don’t let yourself be one of them in your life. FP Edit: Thanks for all the encouragement, everyone. I really didn’t do this for the points, despite a few accusations which I don’t take offence to. A lot of us have been burned by family issues, and I hope that anyone who’s still bitter finds encouragement of their own. I can’t reply to every question, but I will say the best thing you all have said is to keep loving them, which I could never stop doing, and to record any interaction with her, if there ever is one. I would never use that to show my kids she is lying, that would be monstrous. It would just be insurance against any future lies. Only she can reveal who she is to my kids, and I really want to stay strong and neutral for when and if they get disillusioned. Thank you all again, fellow Imgurians.
item.dc:creator: HuigGrotius

item.title: Songs of the Disney Princesses, Dubbed in their Native Languages
item.description:
Moana - How Far I'll Go (Tahitian) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=s02jpSqqazc
Sleeping Beauty - Once Upon a Dream (German) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NxnMTYKmzEQ
Mulan - Reflection (Mandarin Chinese) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FLoxY-qDe2Y
The Little Mermaid - Part of That World (Danish) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7ISDotDNws0
Cinderella - A Dream is a Wish Your Heart Makes (French) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_XFfpI8ZzZg
Hercules - I Won't Say I'm in Love (Greek) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j90n9A7QrJs
Frozen - Let it Go (Norwegian) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ed-UaIRJYyE
Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs - Someday My Prince WIll Come (German)
The Lion King - Can You Feel the Love Tonight? (Zulu) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Wjt9pdnJ-9I
Pocahontas - Colors of the Wind (Several Indigenous American languages) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pYV8RPAyX3A
Beauty and the Beast - Belle (French)
Tangled - When Will My Life Begin (German) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DnTl-cMnxWM
Aladdin - A Whole New World (Arabic) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=x6boqhcdIQI
Frozen II - Into the Unknown (Several Ural Languages) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ckXmR7Eonpc

item.title: This past weekend at Tampa convention center...
item.description: If people gather together and even ONE Nazi flag is there, you have a Nazi gathering. I see 3. The blue flag says DeSantis country. “I, ___, do solemnly swear (or affirm) that I will support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic..." And here we have domestic enemies https://www.wfla.com/news/hillsborough-county/fl-holocaust-museum-nikki-fried-denounce-group-flying-nazi-flags-in-downtown-tampa/
item.dc:creator: thinkybrainpains

item.title: The church of hate and hypocrisy is the alter of corrupt preachers with power
item.dc:creator: roanhouse

item.title: but how?
item.description: Seriously. People motivate themselves, each other, to do things, and I have almost none of it, for like, 20 years now. I can't take care of myself, I can't hold a job, I can't maintain long-lasting relationships. I have nothing and in all likelihood, due to the debilitating nature of my depression, I will always stay nothing. I can't build a life because I don't have a clue as to how to even start. I am goddamn broken and nobody seems to understand that what they're asking of me, to find it within myself, to find a reason, to see a future... I don't have it. I can't find it. It's not in there. I can't die. It'd be unfair to the people that love me. So I don't. But fuck, it's hard to figure out how to keep going. Thanks for letting me vent, Imgur. Lil Most Viral Edit: Discipline, motivation, these things people assume just take a lil elbow grease, just gotta put my mind to it? Yeah, I don't have them, can't do them, can't access the pool of energy for it, don't know where to find it. Also, please stop telling me to get a job. I would love one. I'm unqualified for most and the ones I am qualified for I can't handle. I have recently been given the advice to get myself 100% work disqualified due to psychological issues by my government. I'm telling you all this so I don't have to reply to every comment, btw. Not because I don't appreciate the support and the effort people are putting into their comments! Thank you all very much for letting me know I'm not alone and for trying to give useful advice.
item.dc:creator: wargarbel
